title: Erasure Receipt
description: User-facing receipt for an erasure action. Produced by `REQUEST_ERASURE_RECEIPT` after `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA` completes; rendered in screen `54-system-menu` and copyable to clipboard. The receipt is the auditable artifact that completes the GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA §1798.105 "verifiable" half. Cross-link: `docs/legal/erasure-process.md`.

performedAt.description: ISO 8601 wall-clock; never used for gameplay determinism.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of the affected inventory rows at the moment of erasure. Lets a user verify the receipt against the prior salt fingerprint.

policyVersion.description: Privacy-policy version in effect at the moment of erasure, mirrored from the top of `docs/architecture/privacy.md`.

signalingSessionId.description: Optional opaque signaling session id, carried only when the user was in an active multiplayer session. Used by the manual erasure-process fallback to address the server-side delete request.
